title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF PUTING BUHANGIN, BARRIO MAGALANGGALANG, MUNICIPALITY OF BAUAN, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, INTO A BARRIO OF SAID MUNICIPALITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE BARRIO OF ORENSE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5317 / 53 OG No. 16, 5144 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1710, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF PUTING BUHANGIN, BARRIO MAGALANGGALANG, MUNICIPALITY OF BAUAN, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, INTO A BARRIO OF SAID MUNICIPALITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE BARRIO OF ORENSE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Puting Buhangin, barrio Magalanggalang, Municipality of Bauan, Province of Batangas, is converted into a barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Orense.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
